positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a futuristic forest grove at twilight. The composition should be symmetrical and centered, featuring abstract, bioluminescent flora and geometric fauna. The main subject is a single, elegant, soaring heron silhouette rendered in solid, contrasting black against a vibrant, ethereal gradient background of deep indigo, cyan, and lavender. Use highly contrasting flat vectors and clean line work, reminiscent of Art Deco meets modern nature illustrations. Strong rim lighting emphasizing the bird's silhouette. High contrast, print-ready resolution, isolated subjects, perfect for apparel transfer printing.
negative: blur, artifact, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, cropped, distorted, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, messy, photorealism, gradient background bleed, logos, trademarks, complex details
